name: com.hubspot/hubspot-mcp
title: HubSpot
description: Contacts, companies, deals, and tickets - HubSpot's official hosted MCP with OAuth.

byoClient.guide:
HubSpot requires you to create a Public App in their developer portal first, then Wayland connects with the credentials it issues.

**1.** Sign in to **developers.hubspot.com** with your HubSpot account. If you've never created a developer account before, click **Create app developer account** (free).

**2.** From the developer dashboard, click **Apps → Create app** (top right).

**3.** On the **Auth** tab:
  - Set the **Redirect URL** to the URL Wayland shows below.
  - Under **Scopes**, search for and add: `crm.objects.contacts.read`, `crm.objects.contacts.write`, `crm.objects.deals.read`, `crm.objects.deals.write`.
  - Click **Save changes**.

**4.** Copy the **Client ID** and **Client secret** from the **Auth** tab and paste them below.
